outfit_info.theme: Warmth and Texture, Contrast and Chic
outfit_info.outfit_description: A cozy yet chic ensemble featuring a warm teddy down jacket over a patterned virgin wool sweater. This is paired with a vibrant quilted mini skirt and elegant knee-high leather boots. A suede tote bag completes the sophisticated, cold-weather look, blending comfort with a stylish edge.

model_attributes.body: The model has a slender physique, standing gracefully with a natural and poised demeanor.
model_attributes.pose: Standing upright with both feet planted, holding a handbag casually with one hand, facing forward.
model_attributes.background: A clean and minimalist plain white studio background, providing clear focus on the outfit.
